title: nicotiana miersii var. miersii
intro: Nicotiana miersii var. miersii, also known as the Australian flowering tobacco, is a plant species native to Australia and parts of Asia, characterized by its fragrant, trumpet-shaped flowers and slender foliage. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Nicotiana miersii var. miersii include its ability to ease respiratory congestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusing the leaves in hot water or steam inhalation to harness its medicinal properties.
